_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of statistical modeling methods including regression modeling (OLS, GLM, mixed effects), survival analysis, Bayesian modeling, and simulation methods.
comments: NICE knowledge intersects with WIDAI AB domain. Knowledge AB-K-008 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AG-K-001 (AG, cosine: 0.554), AI-K-002 (AI, cosine: 0.528).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.8/10 (raw 0.678). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge]. NICE-only terms [mathematical, models] vs WIDAI-only terms [analysis, bayesian, effects, glm, methods, mixed] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.884 (P=0.931, R=0.842). P exceeds R by 0.089 — the NICE element's 4 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 19 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the NICE element.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.8%). "Knowledge of mathematical models" and "Knowledge of statistical modeling methods including regression modeling (OLS, GL" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.582 < STS 0.678 (gap -0.096). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [mathematical, models] and [analysis, bayesian, effects] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 11.1%. Shared tokens: [knowledge]. NICE-only: [mathematical, models]. WIDAI-only: [analysis, bayesian, effects, glm, methods, mixed].
